hero.title: THE INTELLIGENT EXCHANGE FOR DIGITAL VALUE
hero.subtitle: Connecting Merchants and Distributors Through Secure, Tokenized Digital Commerce
hero.description: Mezzofy is the digital coupon exchange protocol — powering coupons, vouchers, and gift vouchers through a single tokenized infrastructure.

protocol.title: The Future of Digital Coupons is Secure, Standardized, and Tokenized
protocol.description: Traditional digital coupon distribution is failing due to fragmentation, high costs, and security risks. We eliminate the obsolete SaaS model and replace it with a high-liquidity, high-performance Exchange Protocol.

network.title: From Tool to Network
network.description: We focus on network effects and secure settlement, not just features. Build real value through connections.

ai.title: AI-Native Infrastructure
ai.description: Our data is machine-readable, making us the standard interface for the next generation of autonomous AI shopping agents.

security.title: Unrivaled Security
security.description: Every digital coupon is standardized into the Mezzofy Coupon Standard, a proprietary protocol that guarantees unique, fraud-proof digital assets.

ecosystem.title: From Vision to Products: The Mezzofy Ecosystem
ecosystem.description: Our Exchange Protocol powers a complete suite of products designed to execute our infrastructure vision across the entire coupon lifecycle
ecosystem.diagram: [Visual Diagram: Product Ecosystem Layers showing the relationship between Core Infrastructure → Distribution Channels → Consumer Experience → Strategy]

coreInfra.title: Core Infrastructure
coreInfra.description: Foundation products for creating and exchanging coupons

retail.title: Retail Excellence

merchants.title: For Merchants: Turn Coupon Liabilities into High-Performing Digital Assets
merchants.description: Join the Exchange for free and gain instant access to global distribution channels. You only pay when a sale is successfully made and redeemed.

benefit1.title: Zero Upfront Cost
benefit1.description: Free Onboarding. Pay only a small transaction fee upon final, successful redemption (Performance-Based Model).

benefit2.title: Flexible Control
benefit2.description: Use our Bridge API with your existing CMS, or utilize our free Mezzofy CMS products. You dictate the rules, we handle the security.

benefit3.title: Global Footprint
benefit3.description: Instantly expose your inventory to our B2B marketplace, channel partners, and the high-volume NFC Network for physical retail engagement.

benefit4.title: Future-Proof Asset
benefit4.description: Your digital coupons are tokenized, opening up possibilities for secondary markets and new financial instruments (RWA Linkage).

distributors.title: For Distributors: Access the World's Most Secure, High-Intent Coupon Inventory
distributors.description: Enhance your loyalty program, banking app, or corporate HR portal with real-time, verified digital coupon inventory — without the financial risk of upfront purchasing.

benefit1.title: Risk-Free Integration
benefit1.description: Free to Access and seamless integration via the Bridge API. Instantly pull verified digital coupons into your platform.
benefit1.kyc: KYC verification is required to register an account and access the Exchange.

benefit2.title: Cash Flow Protection
benefit2.description: Our Consignment Settlement Model requires only a partial upfront deposit for Large Enterprises, with the bulk of the charge processed only on verified redemption.

benefit3.title: Standardized Quality
benefit3.description: All coupons adhere to the Mezzofy Coupon Standard, eliminating fraud risk and ensuring a perfect redemption experience for your customers.

benefit4.title: Targeted Distribution
benefit4.description: Consume inventory tailored for your channels: Loyalty & HR for internal benefits, and the AI Agent API for programmatic consumption.

developers.title: Build on the Exchange Protocol
developers.description: Integrate coupon functionality into any platform with a developer-first REST API, multi-language SDKs, and comprehensive coupon functions.

api.title: API
api.description: RESTful API with OAuth 2.0 and webhook support for real-time events

sdk.title: SDK
sdk.description: Official SDKs for every major platform — reduce integration time with idiomatic libraries

functions.title: Coupon Functions
functions.description: Full lifecycle control from issuance to redemption validation across all channels

aiCommerce.title: The Coupon Infrastructure for AI Agents
aiCommerce.description: When ChatGPT, Gemini, or Kimi recommend a deal, it comes from the Mezzofy Exchange — tokenized, fraud-proof, and ready to redeem. 900M+ weekly AI users. Your merchant inventory. One integration.

acp.title: ChatGPT — Agentic Commerce Protocol (ACP)
acp.description: User asks for a deal → ChatGPT queries Mezzofy → consumer redeems via Instant Checkout inside chat

ucp.title: Google Gemini — Universal Commerce Protocol (UCP)
ucp.description: Coupons indexed in Google Shopping Graph and surfaced across Search, Maps, Shopping, and Assistant

mcp.title: Kimi & Regional AI Agents — MCP / REST API
mcp.description: Access mainland China, Hong Kong, and Taiwan via Moonshot AI's Kimi through MCP and China Mobile partnership

tokenization.title: The Exchange Core: Where Commerce Meets Security
tokenization.description: Our Layer 2 Core transforms simple promotional codes into unique, trackable digital assets.

component1.title: Standardization & Tokenization
component1.description: Every digital coupon is tokenized upon ingestion, converting it into a secure, single-use digital asset (NFT/fungible instrument).

component2.title: Asset Linkage
component2.description: We create the foundation for linking these assets to Real-World Assets (RWA), expanding the digital coupon market into the rapidly growing Web3/DeFi asset space.

component3.title: Clearinghouse
component3.description: The core manages all consignment, financial reconciliation, and fraudless validation.

hero.title: ABOUT COMPANY
hero.subtitle: Connecting Businesses and Customers Through The Power of Smart Couponing

nameOrigin.title: Name Origin
nameOrigin.description: 'Mezzo' (Italian for 'medium') combined with '-fy' (meaning 'to make')—reflecting our mission to build the intelligent medium that transforms digital coupons into secure, tokenized assets, connecting merchants and distributors worldwide.

corePurpose.title: Core Purpose
corePurpose.description: Mezzofy is the AI-powered Exchange Protocol that standardizes digital coupons into secure, fraud-proof assets—connecting coupon Supply directly to Demand through a machine-readable clearinghouse built for the next generation of commerce.

keyObjectives.title: Key Objectives
keyObjectives.description: We are building the future on three pillars: Network Effects Over Features, focusing on secure settlement and real value through connections; AI-Native Infrastructure, making our data machine-readable for the next generation of autonomous AI shopping agents; and Unrivaled Security, ensuring every coupon is a unique, fraud-proof digital asset through the Mezzofy Coupon Standard.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Mezzofy and the Global Coupon Exchange Protocol

q1.question: What is Mezzofy?
q1.answer: Mezzofy is the Global Coupon Exchange Protocol — an AI-powered, tokenized infrastructure that connects coupon and voucher Supply directly to Demand. Founded in 2015 in Hong Kong, Mezzofy standardizes digital coupons into secure, fraud-proof assets, enabling merchants and distributors worldwide to create, exchange, and redeem coupons at scale.

q2.question: What is the Global Coupon Exchange Protocol?
q2.answer: The Global Coupon Exchange Protocol is Mezzofy's proprietary standard that transforms digital coupons into unique, tokenized digital assets. It provides a machine-readable clearinghouse for coupon creation, distribution, validation, and redemption — eliminating fraud, fragmentation, and high costs associated with traditional coupon platforms.

q3.question: Who founded Mezzofy and when?
q3.answer: Mezzofy was founded by Dicky in 2015 in Hong Kong. Dicky, a fintech entrepreneur specializing in digital coupons, NFC technology, and coupon exchange protocols, built Mezzofy to solve the fragmentation and security challenges in the global digital coupons industry.

q4.question: What industries and markets does Mezzofy serve?
q4.answer: Mezzofy serves multinational brands across retail, beauty, hospitality, finance, and entertainment sectors. The platform connects merchants and distributors in global markets, supporting coupon campaigns at scale for brands ranging from luxury retailers to fast-food chains and financial institutions.

q5.question: What awards has Mezzofy received?
q5.answer: Mezzofy has received recognition for innovation and sustainability, including the HK Awards for Environmental Excellence and dual ESG Forum 2024 awards. These honors reflect Mezzofy's commitment to reducing paper waste through digital coupon infrastructure and advancing environmental, social, and governance (ESG) standards.

q6.question: How does Mezzofy differ from traditional coupon software?
q6.answer: Unlike traditional coupon SaaS tools focused on features, Mezzofy is an Exchange Protocol built for network effects. Every coupon is tokenized into a unique, fraud-proof digital asset through the Mezzofy Coupon Standard — providing AI-native, machine-readable infrastructure as the standard interface for the next generation of autonomous AI commerce.

q7.question: How does Mezzofy support environmental sustainability?
q7.answer: Mezzofy advances sustainability by replacing paper coupons with digital, tokenized alternatives — reducing physical waste across retail and hospitality supply chains. This commitment earned Mezzofy the HK Awards for Environmental Excellence and ESG Forum 2024 recognition, demonstrating measurable environmental impact alongside commercial performance.

hero.label: COUPON MARKETPLACE
hero.title: GLOBAL EXCHANGE HUB FOR COUPONS
hero.description: The only secure peer-to-peer coupon exchange enabling B2B, B2C, and C2C transactions. Built on tokenization technology to create a secondary market for digital coupons with fraud-proof validation.

exchange.title: The Coupon Exchange Protocol
exchange.description: Traditional digital promotions are failing due to fragmentation, high costs, and security risks. Mezzofy eliminates the obsolete model and replaces it with a high-liquidity, high-performance Exchange Protocol.

network.title: From Tool to Network
network.description: We focus on network effects and secure settlement, not just features. Build real value through connections across the global marketplace.

security.title: Unrivaled Security
security.description: Every promotion is standardized into the Mezzofy Coupon Standard, a proprietary protocol that guarantees unique, fraud-proof digital assets.

ai.title: AI-Native Infrastructure

b2b.description: Mezzofy serves as the central exchange hub connecting merchants with distributors, resellers, and channel partners. List your coupon inventory and gain instant access to global distribution networks.

b2b.benefit2: Channel Partner Network: Connect with marketing platforms, loyalty programs, and affiliate networks
b2b.benefit3: Cross-Promotion Opportunities: Trade inventory with complementary businesses for mutual benefit
b2b.benefit4: Transparent Pricing: Real-time market pricing with automated settlement and commission tracking
b2b.cardDescription: Turn coupon liabilities into high-performing digital assets with global reach

b2c.title: Business to Consumer
b2c.description: Enable direct customer engagement through secure, personalized promotional campaigns that drive measurable results.
b2c.benefit1: Direct Distribution: Push coupons to customers via email, SMS, social media, and mobile apps
b2c.benefit2: Personalized Campaigns: Target specific customer segments with tailored promotional offers
b2c.benefit3: Real-Time Analytics: Track redemption rates, customer engagement, and campaign performance
b2c.benefit4: Multi-Channel Reach: Distribute through marketplaces, e-commerce platforms, and retail partners
b2c.cardDescription: Direct customer engagement with personalized promotional campaigns

c2c.title: Consumer to Consumer
c2c.description: The world's first secure peer-to-peer coupon exchange marketplace. Transfer, gift, or trade coupons with fraud-proof validation.
c2c.benefit1: Transferable Coupons: Gift or transfer coupons to friends and family with secure validation
c2c.benefit2: Secondary Marketplace: Trade or sell unused coupons to maximize value and reduce waste
c2c.benefit3: Fraud Prevention: Blockchain-inspired tokenization ensures each coupon is unique and valid
c2c.benefit4: Increased Redemption: Unused coupons find new owners, driving actual business value for merchants
c2c.cardDescription: Peer-to-peer coupon exchange with fraud-proof validation

q1.question: What are my technology obligations as a channel partner?
q1.answer: Zero. Mezzofy handles all technology infrastructure, merchant inventory management, tag configuration, and content updates. You simply deploy the physical tags in your spaces.

q2.question: How do I control which merchant offers appear on my tags?
q2.answer: Channel partners can set geographic, category, and value tier filters. Mezzofy's routing engine automatically matches the most relevant merchant inventory to your audience demographics and location.

q3.question: What if a merchant leaves the network?
q3.answer: Your tags remain fully operational. The Mezzofy exchange automatically routes new merchant inventory to replace any merchants that leave. The distribution node stays alive and valuable to your audience.

q4.question: How quickly can I launch a pilot deployment?
q4.answer: Onboarding typically takes 1-2 weeks from initial discussion to live deployment. For strategic partners (enterprise HR, mid-size malls), we fast-track to 5-7 business days with dedicated implementation support.

header.title: 🎫 How to Use Mezzofy NFC Coupons
header.subtitle: Your complete guide to tapping, claiming, and redeeming digital coupons

intro.title: Welcome to the Future of Coupons!
intro.description: Mezzofy's NFC technology makes saving money easier than ever. Simply tap your phone on any Mezzofy NFC sticker or scan a QR code to unlock exclusive deals. Follow this simple guide to start saving today!

step1.title: Enable NFC on Your Phone
step1.description: Before you can tap and save, make sure NFC is enabled on your smartphone:
step1.iphone: iPhone: NFC is always on for iPhone 7 and newer. No setup needed!
step1.android: Android: Go to Settings → Connected Devices → Connection Preferences → NFC → Turn ON

step2.title: Tap Your Phone
step2.description: Hold the back of your smartphone close to the NFC sticker (within 1-2 inches). You'll feel a vibration or hear a sound confirming the tap. Your phone will automatically open the coupon link in your browser.

step3.title: View Coupon Details
step3.description: Once the page loads, you'll see:

optionA.heading: Option A: With Mezzofy Coupon Clipper App (Recommended)
optionA.intro: For the best experience, download the Mezzofy Coupon Clipper app:
optionA.item1: Seamless Collection: Tap any NFC coupon and it automatically saves to your app
optionA.item2: No Personal Data Required: Start using immediately without sign-up
optionA.item3: All Coupons in One Place: Easy access to your entire coupon collection
optionA.item4: Instant Redemption: Show coupons directly from the app at checkout

optionB.heading: Option B: Without the App (Browser-Based)
optionB.intro: Don't have the app yet? No problem! When you tap an NFC coupon:
optionB.item1: The coupon details page launches immediately in your browser
optionB.item2: View and use the coupon right away at checkout
optionB.item3: Save Options: Optionally save to Apple Wallet, Google Wallet, or Samsung Wallet
optionB.item4: Or Download the App: A convenient link to download Mezzofy Coupon Clipper for future use

step5.title: Redeem at Checkout
step5.description: When you're ready to use your coupon:
step5.item1: Open your Mezzofy Coupon Clipper app or access the coupon from your device wallet
step5.item2: Select the coupon you want to use
step5.item3: Show the QR code or barcode to the merchant's scanner at checkout

features.title: ✨ Key Features of Mezzofy NFC Coupons
features.feature1: Instant Access: No need to download apps before tapping – works directly in your browser
features.feature2: Privacy-Friendly: The Coupon Clipper app requires no personal data to use
features.feature3: Multiple Wallet Options: Save to Mezzofy, Apple Wallet, Google Wallet, or Samsung Wallet
features.feature4: No Printing Required: Completely paperless and eco-friendly
features.feature5: Real-Time Updates: Get notifications about new deals and expiring coupons
features.feature6: Multi-Portal Support: Works with B2C, C2C, and partner merchant systems

tips.title: 💡 Pro Tips for Maximum Savings
tips.tip1: Download the App: Get the Mezzofy Coupon Clipper for the fastest, most seamless experience
tips.tip2: Enable Notifications: Never miss a deal – allow Mezzofy to send you alerts about new coupons and expiring offers
tips.tip3: Check Expiration Dates: Use your coupons before they expire to maximize your savings
tips.tip4: Stack Offers: Some merchants allow you to combine multiple coupons – check the terms!
tips.tip5: Share with Friends: Use our C2C portal to trade or gift coupons you won't use
tips.tip6: Follow Favorite Merchants: Get exclusive early access to their promotions

q1.question: Q: Do I need to download an app to use NFC coupons?
q1.answer: A: No! You can tap and view coupons directly in your mobile browser. However, downloading the Mezzofy Coupon Clipper app provides the best experience with automatic coupon collection and no personal data required.

q2.question: Q: What if my phone doesn't have NFC?
q2.answer: A: No problem! Every NFC coupon also has a QR code option. Simply open your camera app and scan the QR code to access the same coupon.

q3.question: Q: Does the Mezzofy Coupon Clipper app require personal information?
q3.answer: A: No! You can start using the app immediately without providing any personal data. It's designed for privacy and convenience.

q4.question: Q: Can I use a coupon multiple times?
q4.answer: A: It depends on the coupon terms. Most coupons are single-use, but some promotional offers allow multiple redemptions. Check the coupon details for specific information.

q5.question: Q: What happens if I tap a coupon but don't save it?
q5.answer: A: Without the app, you can still use the coupon immediately from the browser page. You can also save it to your device wallet (Apple, Google, or Samsung) or tap the same NFC sticker again later.

q6.question: Q: Can I transfer my coupons to someone else?
q6.answer: A: Yes! Through our C2C (Customer-to-Customer) portal, you can trade, gift, or sell unused coupons to other Mezzofy users.

q7.question: Q: What if the coupon doesn't work at checkout?
q7.answer: A: First, check that the coupon hasn't expired and that you're using it at a participating merchant. If issues persist, contact the merchant or Mezzofy customer support for assistance.

q8.question: Q: Which wallet should I use to save coupons?
q8.answer: A: We recommend the Mezzofy Coupon Clipper app for the best experience. However, you can also save to Apple Wallet (iPhone), Google Wallet (Android), or Samsung Wallet depending on your device.

nfcFeature.description: Mobile app users can interact with Mezzofy NFC tags to instantly download coupons with a simple tap. No manual input required - just tap your phone to the NFC tag and coupons are added to your wallet automatically.

ecosystem.title: Works Seamlessly with the Mezzofy Ecosystem
ecosystem.subtitle: Coupon Wallet integrates with other Mezzofy products to create a complete solution

marketing.title: + Coupon Campaign
marketing.description: Purchased vouchers automatically added to wallet

marketplace.title: + Coupon Marketplace
marketplace.description: Access marketplace inventory from wallet interface

bundle.title: Recommended Bundle: Retail Excellence Bundle
bundle.description: Essential customer experience layer for any coupon distribution strategy

footerCta.title: Ready to Launch Your Digital Wallet?
footerCta.subtitle: Join leading brands and provide your customers with a seamless coupon wallet experience

hero.title: YOUR UNIQUE SERIAL FOR REDEMPTION
hero.subtitle: Every coupon on the Mezzofy platform carries a unique, tamper-proof serial number. Customers present their serial to redeem at any participating merchant seamlessly.

platforms.title: Save & Present Anywhere
platforms.subtitle: Customers save their unique serial to their preferred wallet or access it via a secure web link — no special app required.

appleWallet.title: Apple Wallet
appleWallet.description: Save your coupon serial to Apple Wallet for one-tap display at checkout. Works offline and shows expiry status in real time.

googlePay.title: Google Pay
googlePay.description: Add to Google Pay for instant access on any Android device. Tap to show your serial at the merchant point-of-sale.

samsungWallet.title: Samsung Wallet
samsungWallet.description: Compatible with Samsung Wallet for Galaxy device users. Loyalty-card style display with full merchant branding.

webBrowser.title: Web Browser / QR Link
webBrowser.description: No app required. Access your serial via a secure web link or QR code on any browser, any device.

voucherIdentity.title: Coupon Identity
voucherIdentity.item2: Tamper-proof cryptographic signing via Mezzofy Protocol
voucherIdentity.item3: QR code and barcode representation included
voucherIdentity.item4: Real-time validity status — Active, Redeemed, Expired, Voided

redemptionExperience.title: Redemption Experience
redemptionExperience.item1: Displays T&C, validity period, and redemption locations
redemptionExperience.item2: Multi-language content — English, Traditional & Simplified Chinese
redemptionExperience.item3: One-tap save to Apple Wallet, Google Pay, or Samsung Wallet
redemptionExperience.item4: Transfer to another customer with full audit trail
redemptionExperience.item5: Partial redemption support for split-value vouchers

integrationOwnership.title: Integration & Ownership
integrationOwnership.item1: Save to Coupon Wallet if ownership is not yet assigned
integrationOwnership.item2: API-triggered serial generation on purchase or distribution
integrationOwnership.item3: Webhook callbacks on redemption and transfer events
integrationOwnership.item4: White-label serial display page with your branding
integrationOwnership.item5: Compatible with existing POS and e-commerce systems

step1.title: Receive Your Serial
step1.description: Upon purchase or distribution, customers receive a unique serial number by email, SMS, or directly in the Mezzofy Coupon Wallet.

step2.title: Save or Share
step2.description: Save the serial to Apple Wallet, Google Pay, or Samsung Wallet in one tap — or transfer it to someone else as a gift.

step3.title: Redeem Anywhere
step3.description: Present the serial at any participating merchant. Instant validation — no paper required, no app needed.

integrationOptions.title: Integration That Fits Your Brand
integrationOptions.subtitle: Whether you need a fully branded serial display page or want to generate serials programmatically, Mezzofy has you covered.

whiteLabelPage.title: White-Label Serial Page
whiteLabelPage.description: Embed a fully branded serial display page in your app or website. Customers see your branding — powered by Mezzofy.
whiteLabelPage.feature1: Custom domain for all serial display URLs
whiteLabelPage.feature2: Full brand color and logo control
whiteLabelPage.feature3: Localized T&C display in any supported language

serialApi.title: Serial API
serialApi.description: Generate, validate, and redeem serials programmatically from your own platform or merchant system.
serialApi.feature1: REST API for serial generation and real-time lookup
serialApi.feature3: Webhook events for redemption and transfer actions
serialApi.feature4: SDK available for iOS, Android, and web

transferFeature.title: Give the Gift of a Coupon
transferFeature.description: Coupon Serial supports peer-to-peer transfer. Customers can gift or resell their coupon to another person. The transfer is fully traceable — the serial remains valid under the new owner, perfect for gift cards, promotions, and loyalty rewards.

ecosystem.title: Works Seamlessly with the Mezzofy Ecosystem
ecosystem.subtitle: Coupon Serial integrates with other Mezzofy products to create a complete coupon lifecycle

wallet.title: + Coupon Wallet
wallet.description: Save serials directly into Coupon Wallet for organized storage across all vouchers

management.title: + Coupon Management
management.description: Issue and manage thousands of serials from a central dashboard with full lifecycle control

nfc.title: + Coupon NFC
nfc.description: Embed serial-linked NFC tags in physical packaging for tap-to-activate experiences

bundle.title: 💡 Recommended Bundle: Customer Journey Bundle
bundle.description: Combine Serial with Wallet and Management for a complete end-to-end coupon lifecycle solution.

footerCta.title: Ready to Issue Your First Serial Coupon?
footerCta.subtitle: Join merchants and distributors who trust Mezzofy to manage digital vouchers at scale

hero.title: We're Here to Help — 24/7
hero.subtitle: Dedicated support for merchants, distributors, partners, and end users across the Mezzofy platform. Our team is available around the clock to ensure your business never stops.

reach.title: How to Reach Us
reach.description: Choose the support channel that best fits your role on the Mezzofy platform.

merchant.title: Merchant Portal
merchant.desc: Supply-side customers can submit and track support requests directly through the Merchant Portal. Access ticketing and documentation.

partner.title: Distributor Portal
partner.desc: Distributors can manage support requests, review SLAs, track inventory issues, and escalate tickets through the Distributor Portal.

email.title: Email Support
email.desc: For consumers and end users who need assistance with coupon redemption, wallet issues, or general inquiries.

audience.title: Support by Audience
audience.description: Common issues and what to do, organized by user type.

supply.title: Supply Customers (Merchants)
supply.issue1: Coupon not activating or displaying incorrectly
supply.issue2: NFC tag setup and configuration issues
supply.issue3: Redemption data discrepancies or reporting errors
supply.issue4: API integration failures or webhook errors
supply.note: Please check your store network and device configuration before submitting a ticket.

demand.title: Demand Customers (Distributors & Partners)
demand.issue1: Marketplace access or inventory sync issues
demand.issue2: Bridge API authentication or rate limit errors

partners.title: End Users & Consumers
partners.issue2: Wallet app login or sync issues
partners.issue3: NFC tap not recognized at point of sale
partners.issue4: Coupon expired or terms not as expected

sla.title: Service Level Agreement (SLA)
sla.description: Our commitment to response and resolution times across all support tiers.
sla.hosting: Hosted on AWS (Singapore region) — 99.9% uptime SLA
sla.disclaimer: SLA timers begin upon ticket acknowledgement. Resolution times are targets, not guarantees, and may vary for issues requiring third-party involvement. Support hours are based on Singapore Time (SGT, UTC+8).

process.title: Ticket Process
process.description: What happens after you submit a support request.

step1.title: Submit
step1.desc: Submit your request via the Merchant Portal, Distributor Portal, or email. Include your account ID, a clear description, and any screenshots or logs.

step2.title: Acknowledge
step2.desc: Our team acknowledges your ticket within the SLA response time and assigns a case reference number for tracking.

step3.title: Investigate & Update
step3.desc: Our engineers investigate the issue and provide regular updates. You will be notified at each status change via email or portal notification.

step4.title: Resolve
step4.desc: Once resolved, we provide a full resolution summary and confirm closure with you. You can reopen the ticket within 7 days if the issue recurs.

footerCta.title: Ready to Get Support?
footerCta.description: Our team is available 24/7 to help you resolve any issues with the Mezzofy platform.

aiChat.title: Mezzofy Support Assistant
aiChat.subtitle: Get instant answers to common questions or submit a support ticket.
